title: Collapse nested if/else into pattern-matched function heads
prompt: Given: `def describe(x) do if x > 0 do "positive" else if x < 0 do "negative" else "zero" end end end`. Rewrite as three function heads, each with a guard: `def describe(x) when x > 0`, `def describe(x) when x < 0`, and a clause for `0`. Output the complete module `defmodule MyApp.SignLabel do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Classic refactoring exercise from Nick Janetakis's guide.
research_citation: Nick Janetakis: 'Refactoring Elixir Code: If, Cond and Pattern Matching' — three-pass evolution to function heads.
